bundle_roles.Sp1: quaternionic Hopf transport on S3->S7->S4; K_ab is its connection-metric coefficient matrix
bundle_roles.U1: right-circle connection on S1->S7->CP3; the a=3 coefficient is recovered by S1-first then S2 pushforward
bundle_roles.twistor_S2: associated homogeneous directions transported by the Sp1 connection; not an independent principal gauge field in P1

claim_boundary: Exact normalization statements are off-shell or explicitly conditioned. No observed-spacetime, particle, coupling, absolute-unit, or full-BHSM claim follows.
